'''''Polis''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] the served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. It was part of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial II-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'''s]] [[Corrupter repair convoy|resupply convoy]] which was lead by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigate]] [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']] to the Corrupter in the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]]. The ship was then attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders and was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
